options.name: -clock
options.description: Considers only input ports with input delay relative to the specified list of clocks

options.name: -edge_triggered
options.description: Returns a collection of input ports with the set_input_delay -clock constraint

options.name: -level_sensitive
options.description: Returns a collection of input ports with the set_input_delay -level_sensitive constraint.

options.name: -no_clocks
options.description: Returns primary input ports that do not have create_clock or create_generated_clock constraints
